name: Transcription Initiation in Eukaryotes
description: Eukaryotic transcription initiation: TFIID/TBP recognizes the core promoter, general factors recruit RNA polymerase II to form the pre-initiation complex, TFIIH melts the DNA, and CTD phosphorylation drives promoter escape into elongation.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Core promoter (TATA)"]
    N2["TFIID (TBP) binds TATA"]
    N3["TFIIB/F recruit Pol II"]
    N4["TFIIE/H join: PIC"]
    N5["TFIIH opens DNA"]
    N6["Open complex"]
    N7{"Productive escape?"}
    N8["CTD phosphorylation"]
    N9["Elongation begins"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|abortive| N6
    N7 -->|escape| N8
    N8 --> N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: CTD phosphorylation
nodeDetails.detail: CDK7 phosphorylates the CTD, releasing Pol II

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Structural basis of transcription initiation by RNA polymerase II
sources.authors: Sainsbury, S.; Bernecky, C.; Cramer, P.

sources.title: Eukaryotic core promoters and the functional basis of transcription initiation
